title: BeWell Assignment #1 (filled out as Riley Edgar)
html:
A 12-page filled-out wellness self-assessment for an OSU BeWell course — submitted under the name Riley Edgar with student ID 934378042. Yahir appears to have completed this homework on someone else's behalf (the journal entries are written in first person about "his" mom, golf, sauna habits — recognizably Yahir's voice).

TL;DR

  • A rare paid/favor schoolwork artifact — the only 2023 file where Yahir is operating under another student's identity.
  • Fitness/wellness self-portrait: pickup basketball, strength training, ~7hrs sleep target, mostly good nutrition with the giveaway "burrito bowl, brown rice, chicken, pico" lunch.
  • SMART goal: bed by 10:30, wake at 7:30, six weeks (Jan 20 – Mar 14, 2023).
  • Reveals the sauna habit and the golf as decompression coping pattern — both echo across other 2023 journals.

Oregon State University · bewell class · sauna habit · golf as decompression · ghostwriting favors
